title: Book publishers sue Google for copyright infringement over Gemini AI training
description: Group of major publishers accuses the tech giant of ‘one of the most prolific infringements of copyrighted materials in history’
content: A group of major publishers have filed a lawsuit against Google, accusing the company of illegally using millions of copyrighted books to help build its Gemini artificial intelligence models, in “one of the most prolific infringements of copyrighted ... [3095 chars]

title: US Supreme Court justices describe bulletproof vests and 'swatting' hoax
description: Two justices appeared before Congress to ask for $228m (£170.3m) in security funding as threats continue to rise - both in person and online.
content:
Two US Supreme Court justices have been lobbying Congress for millions in extra security funding for themselves and their colleagues to help protect them from a rise in threats to their safety.
The court's request of $228m (£170.3m) is a 53% increase... [3388 chars]

title: Supreme court justices testify to House on security budget increase amid rise in threats
description: Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett appear before House lawmakers to request enhanced security detail
content:
Supreme court justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett are testifying in front of House lawmakers to discuss the court’s budget request, particularly the need for increased security for the judiciary.

title: Police say Ann Widdecombe killed in 'targeted attack' as motive investigated
description: Counter terror police say they have obtained a warrant to hold a 28-year-old suspect for up to seven days.
content:
Anne Widdecombe was killed in a "targeted attack" and detectives are still working to understand the motive, police have said.

title: Man Utd sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa on five-year deal
description: Manchester United complete the signing of Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa on a five-year deal.
content:
Manchester United have completed the signing of Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa on a five-year deal.
United have met a release clause of £35m for the 29-year-old midfielder, who has just helped Belgium reach the World Cup quarter-finals.
